title: Valerie's Foods
body:
# Valerie's Foods

I made this mod, and its assets within about 6 hours.
This mod currently only adds 3 items based on the recipe shown on the Backside of the Promotional McDonalds Fry Packaging for "A Minecraft Movie", I have more planned for this mod in the future.

- McFries, McFry (Single Fry), McFries Packaging-

![Fry Recipe](https://zcdn.mysty.one/r/us5Ie4.png?compress=false)
> 
> I'd like to say that this mod is not near close to being finished, and that I will be continuing this in the future. :3
